feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Recommend me Satanic games /v/
entry.content: Recommend me Satanic games /v/

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Uwe Boll is back
entry.content: >With the film effectively banned in Germany after the country’s film ratings board, the FSK, refused to grant it either an “18+” classification or a “No Youth Clearance” designation, Boll claims the board is using youth protection as a pretext to suppress a film that addresses what he calls “the reality that mass migration from predominantly Islamist countries has severely compromised security in Europe.” >So, Boll isn’t even hiding it. He’s made an anti-immigration story about modern-day Europ

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Rachel Weisz 2001 interview "Hollywood's run by Jews"
entry.content: >EMMA: But, you see, you're holding back from saying what you said at the store, which was that you thought you looked too Jewish. Is it limiting as an actress to be perceived as being too ethnic in any way? >RACHEL: Well, I think you and I have always felt the same way — that we're Jewish but we can get away with just being exotic. We're kind of Jews in disguise. Those cultural stereotypes about the Jew with the big hooky nose and the fleshy face rub off on you. That's terrible to admit, isn't

entry.title: /int/ International: americans dont realize they already own the most aesthetic region on earth new e…
entry.content: americans dont realize they already own the most aesthetic region on earth new england looks absurdly good for no reason nsane coastlines, old fishing towns, colonial architecture, forests that turn unreal colors every autumn, snowy winters that actually feel like winter, mountains, lighthouses, ivy-covered towns looks like an idealized version of civilization instead of endless suburban sprawl

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Where do we draw the line?
entry.content: Where do we draw the line?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Hello, out there! Is the movie over? I'm still down here, and I'm still in quit…
entry.content: >Hello, out there! Is the movie over? I'm still down here, and I'm still in quite a lot of pain. Maybe someone in the lobby could call an ambulance. Oh! The pain is really quite severe. I fashioned a makeshift splint. Here goes nothing!

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Pack bros, how do we save it?
entry.content: Pack bros, how do we save it?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I'm so jaded /v/. Why can't I enjoy games anymore? Is it just me? Have games rea…
entry.content: I'm so jaded /v/. Why can't I enjoy games anymore? Is it just me? Have games really gone downhill? Or is the shitty reality just becoming too shit for me to enjoy games anymore? One thing is for sure, modern games don't inspire me like they used to, and modern game communities feel artificial, policed and astroturfed.

entry.title: /int/ International: America's deep state is trying to decouple from Israel and transition into being…
entry.content: America's deep state is trying to decouple from Israel and transition into being a regional power instead of a global one. First they blasted antisemitism on all normie platforms and then they went into an unwinnable war that wrecks the economy, knowing that it would make everyone hate jews even more. It's all according to keikaku and you'd have to be extremely foolish not to see it

entry.title: /g/ Technology: UNITED STATES STATE SECRETS LEAK
entry.content: THE CIA AND DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE ARE RUNNING A "NO TOUCH TORTURE" PROGRAM TO TORTURE PEOPLE WITH NO ONE KNOWING. IT'S A SUCCESSOR TO THE MKULTRA ILLEGAL HUMAN EXPERIMENTATION PROGRAM. FOR EXAMPLE THEY'LL INDUCE FAKE HEART ATTACKS OR STROKES INTO PEOPLE AND GAUGE HOW MUCH SUFFERING IT CAUSED. CIA should've paid the fucking ransom. The patent "Nervous system manipulation by electromagnetic fields from monitors" exists. This means that using computer monitors they can induce pain in the body by me

entry.title: /g/ Technology: There's a sudden surge of Firefox market share on Statcounter to almost 4%. Chan…
entry.content: There's a sudden surge of Firefox market share on Statcounter to almost 4%. Change of algorithm or did Mozilla do a marketing campaign? Could it be the fallout from manifest v2 being disabled in Chrome? Is Firefox finally getting the comeback it's been waiting for.

It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. entry.title: /o/ Auto: I ended up buying a GEM E4 for just under 8 grand with 2k miles, full doors and …
entry.content: I ended up buying a GEM E4 for just under 8 grand with 2k miles, full doors and all, street legal and registered. Unfortunately after a long time of owning cars, work damaged my spine and with what control I have in the legs left, this is what I can drive without going to hand controls. I am not happy at all having owned a 90 civic tuned up, and an 84 Chevy half ton, a 02 stacked mustang... a number of fun cars over the years. So how do I make the best of this pile of shit (which is mechanically

entry.title: /g/ Technology: VPS prices are out of control
entry.content: > start renting dedicated hetzner box with 32 gigs of ram and 8 cores for 72 euros a few months ago > use it both as a dev box for my hobby projects and some self hosted services (minecraft server, git repo, syncthing, etc.) > friends are too busy to play minecraft for the foreseeable future and I'm short on cash, check out what I can reasonably downgrade to > the exact same box with the exact same specs costs 167 euros per month now Hetzner grandfathered in prices for existing servers so if I c

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Imagine a being tortured so much that their entire soul and even awareness of ex…
entry.content: Imagine a being tortured so much that their entire soul and even awareness of existence beyond pain collapses; and they become nothing more then a screaming entity, a gyrating and twisting cosmic nerve that wants to die but does not even know what death is. And given a long enough time they twist back in on themselves and become a hook of fire, not even a thing but a form that only wants to burn away everything.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: RE started with RE4
entry.content: classic RE >slowly move around at a snail's pace interacting with every piece of trash in the environment to see which are actually relevant for progression >clunky ass tank controls with constant camera shifts every two seconds (you'll walk down a single hallway and the camera will literally shift like 10 times) >oftentimes these camera perspectives obscure items or enemies from the player that would literally be seen by the actual in-game character >combat consists of just holding aim and pres

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Overclocking Help
entry.content: My DDR4 RAM will not boot past 2400MHz in gear 1. 2400MHz runs completely stable, can play games, run benchmarks, no crashes or anything. I bump it to 2500 and it won't boot. I've heard gear 2 is required for super high clocks but this should be nowhere near it right? I should at least be able to run the 3500 XMP profile in gear 1 but nope. I've bumped all the necessary voltages and loosened the timings but no matter how much voltage I give or how loose I make the timings it just WILL NOT boot u
